overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt of Rivia exploring Beauclair Palace in Toussaint. The character walks through sunlit terraces, staircases, and courtyards featuring ornate white stone architecture with red roofs, overlooking mountains and a turquoise lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace with columns overlooking lake

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the palace terrace with swords on his back

entered.detail: tall ornate stone columns supporting the terrace roof
decorative stone railing overlooking the water
black metal fire pit with burning coals
turquoise body of water visible between columns
blue mountain range in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit palace terrace lined with tall stone columns and balustrades. The terrace overlooks a turquoise lake and distant mountains, with decorative braziers positioned along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace exterior staircase and narrow walkway

events.description: transitions from open terrace to descending stone staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt descends the stone stairs and proceeds along a narrow walkway beside the palace wall

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading downward along the palace exterior
tall white stone wall with ornate architectural details
tall pointed towers of the palace complex visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow exterior walkway as Geralt descends stairs alongside the palace wall. Distant spires and towers of the palace complex become visible ahead against the bright sky.

events.description: enters open cobblestone courtyard from narrow passage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks across the cobblestone courtyard toward the central fountain structure

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the fountain steps

entered.detail: open plaza with irregular stone paving
ornate stone fountain with multiple tiers and staircases
white stone buildings with distinctive red tiled roofs
manicured trees and shrubs lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a spacious cobblestone courtyard surrounded by palace buildings with red roofs. A large ornate fountain stands in the center, and a few distant figures can be seen walking near the structure.

events.description: begins ascending curved staircase on the left side of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs the curved stone staircase flanked by statues and flower bushes

entered.detail: sweeping stone stairs with ornate carved railings
statue of an armored figure in a niche

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a grand curved staircase on the courtyard's edge, passing stone statues and purple flowering bushes. The staircase features ornate carved railings and leads upward toward an upper terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper palace terrace with statues overlooking mountains

events.description: emerges onto upper terrace with panoramic mountain vista

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the upper terrace, approaching statues overlooking the mountain valley

entered.detail: open stone platform with geometric paving patterns
classical statue of a robed female figure on a pedestal
sweeping view of green valleys and snow-capped peaks
decorative railing with arched openings overlooking the valley

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches an upper terrace offering panoramic views of the mountain valley. Classical statues stand on pedestals along a stone balustrade, with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance under the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the ornate architecture of Beauclair Palace, transitioning from high sunlit terraces down into a central courtyard and back up toward a panoramic mountain vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a terrace lined with stone columns and braziers overlooking a turquoise lake, before the camera follows him as he descends a narrow exterior walkway alongside the palace walls. The scene then opens into a spacious cobblestone courtyard featuring red-roofed buildings and a large central fountain with distant figures. As the camera continues, Geralt ascends a grand curved staircase adorned with stone statues and purple flowering bushes, finally reaching an upper terrace where classical statues stand against a backdrop of distant snow-capped peaks under a bright sun.
